title: Opening links in desktop app (Redirector extension)
excerpt:
How do i set up the Redirector-extension in chrome to open all monday.com links in the monday.com desktop app? 
I know i found the settings here earlier, but now i can’t find the post

posts.author: egil-terki (Egil)
posts.cookedHtml:
